form.formComment: Facing the starter for the first time. Four-year-old gelding by Sooboog out of Chakana. At the most recent trial finished eighth on September 3 at Scone over 1100m. Fitter for recent trials but likely to struggle.

formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Facing the starter for the first time. Four-year-old gelding by Sooboog out of Chakana. At the most recent trial finished eighth on September 3 at Scone over 1100m. Fitter for recent trials but likely to struggle.

form.formComment: First starter by Blue Point - Clear For Take Off purchased for AUD $ 85,000 (Inglis 2024 Classic Yearling Sale). Hasn't set the track alight with his trials leading into today's race. Well held in recent trials but expected to run well.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). First starter by Blue Point - Clear For Take Off purchased for AUD $ 85,000 (Inglis 2024 Classic Yearling Sale). Hasn't set the track alight with his trials leading into today's race. Well held in recent trials but expected to run well.

form.formComment: Three-year-old gelding making debut by Harry Angel out of Rhiannons Gold. Purchased for AUD $ 160,000 (Inglis 2024 Classic Yearling Sale). Won a barrier trial over 850m at Beaumont (Newcastle) on March 24. Beautifully drawn so can be competitive.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Three-year-old gelding making debut by Harry Angel out of Rhiannons Gold. Purchased for AUD $ 160,000 (Inglis 2024 Classic Yearling Sale). Won a barrier trial over 850m at Beaumont (Newcastle) on March 24. Beautifully drawn so can be competitive.

form.formComment: Dual acceptor. At debut, 5th of 9 at Scone Super Mdn on March 20 over 1000m, on a slow track; 7 len behind Lord Remlap with 58.5kg at $21. Appeals despite another tough draw.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Dual acceptor. At debut, 5th of 9 at Scone Super Mdn on March 20 over 1000m, on a slow track; 7 len behind Lord Remlap with 58.5kg at $21. Appeals despite another tough draw.

form.formComment: Resuming after a five months break. Finished off last preparation fourth of 7 at Muswellbrook Ctry Mdn November 4 over 1280m, 1.5 len behind Arapawa carrying 56kg at $4.20. On debut fourth of 11 at Muswellbrook Ctry Mdn-Sw October 20 over 1280m, 3.5 len behind Pontevedra carrying 55kg at $31. Further improved and is worth including in calculations.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(1). Resuming after a five months break. On debut fourth of 11 at Muswellbrook Ctry Mdn-Sw October 20 over 1280m, 3.5 len behind Pontevedra carrying 55kg at $31. Further improved and is worth including in calculations.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced keenly in the middle stages.

form.formComment: Recent form sound. At the latest run held ground to the line 2nd of 10 at Bendigo 3yo Mdn-Sw on March 27 over 1000m, neck behind Outer Banks carrying 56kg at $21. Before that raced on the speed and boxed on steadily 2nd of 11 at Stony Creek Mdn-Sw on March 8 over 1100m, on a slow track; long-neck behind Snakeinthegrass with 57kg at $8.50. In form and is a leading hope.

formComments.title: TAB

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Passing the 100m shifted in abruptly away from Samand.

form.formComment: Dual acceptor. At debut, made ground from midfield; 2nd of 8 at Wyong Super 3yo Mdn-Sw on March 28 over 1000m, on a slow track; 3.5 len behind Sir Les with 55kg at $8. Shows promise and worth following up.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Dual acceptor. At debut, made ground from midfield; 2nd of 8 at Wyong Super 3yo Mdn-Sw on March 28 over 1000m, on a slow track; 3.5 len behind Sir Les with 55kg at $8. Shows promise and worth following up.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced keenly through the early and middle stages.

form.formComment: Resuming. Only had one start last preparation eased back early on 5th of 8 at Beaumont (Newcastle) Mdn on January 15 over 1200m, on a slow track; 5 len behind California Command carrying 56.5kg at $21. When resuming last campaign second last of 11 at Kembla Grange Mdn on May 10 over 1200m, on a slow track; 8 len behind Mother Goose with 57kg at $16. Likely to need this run.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-6.5). Resuming. When resuming last campaign second last of 11 at Kembla Grange Mdn on May 10 over 1200m, on a slow track; 8 len behind Mother Goose with 57kg at $16. Likely to need this run.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: From a wide barrier, shifted behind runners in the early stages.

form.formComment: Third-up today. Freshened for 52 days. Resuming 4th of 10 at Goulburn Ctry Mdn on January 27 over 1100m, 4 len behind Midnight Moose with 53.5kg at $6. Second-up made ground from midfield; 2nd of 10 at Wagga Ctry Mdn on February 16 over 1000m, 3.5 len behind Tassalina with 53.5kg at $4.40. Don't underestimate.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: On jumping made contact with Uytaahkoo.
Slow to begin. Inclined to lay out when under pressure in the home straight.
Slow to begin. Shortly after shifted inwards and crowded Tallingas Dime.

form.formComment: She is resuming after a five-and-a-half months break. Finished off last preparation seventh of 9 at Port Macquarie Ctry Mdn October 26 over 1006m, 4.5 len behind City Of Tears with 56kg at $4. On debut third of 9 at this track Mdn-Sw September 23 over 1007m, soft track; 4 len behind Argyros carrying 55kg at $5.50. Can find a minor spot fresh.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shortly after the start, steadied when hampered by Russian Escape.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after four months 6th of 9 at Port Macquarie Mdn on March 28 over 1008m, on a slow track; 6 len behind Posh Annie with 55.5kg at $26. Previously second-up ran last of 8 at this track Ctry Mdn-Sw on November 23 over 1005m, on a slow track; 8 len behind Vantorix carrying 55.5kg at $101. No easier this time and not likely to threaten.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin. Steadied after improving onto heels approaching the first turn.
Hampered on jumping by Dandeelion Wishes.
After being slow to begin, raced keenly during the early stages.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after 11 months raced on the speed and boxed on steadily 2nd of 10 at Port Macquarie Ctry Mdn on March 16 over 1006m, 1.4 len behind Alby's Mate with 56kg at $8.50. Previously second-up 9th of 12 at Port Macquarie Super Mdn on December 29 2024 over 1200m, 5.5 len behind Whispering Muriel carrying 55.5kg at $2.70. Should be thereabouts.
